zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle於大約1362年出生在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾時，她的父親Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle30歲，母親Margaret Pipard41歲。她於大約1380年與Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1392年3月20日之後在英國格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle was born about 1362, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, her father, Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle, was 30 and her mother, Margaret Pipard, was 41. She married Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley about 1380. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died after 20 March 1392, in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England, and was buried in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Engl: Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle est née environ 1362, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Pipard, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley environ 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 20 mars 1392, à Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Engl: Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle um 1362 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle 30 und ihre Mutter Margaret Pipard 41. Sie hat um 1380 Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 20. März 1392 in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley circa 1380. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 20 marzo 1392, nel Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England, e fu sepolta a Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisleが約1362年にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルで生まれた時，父Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisleは30歳，母Margaret Pipardは41歳であった。約1380年にThomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1392年3月20日以後にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウオットオン ウンダー エッジで死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウオットオン ウンダー エッジにて埋葬された。

ko.Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 보턴 운더 에지
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle(이)가 대략 1362년 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Pipard(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1392년 3월 20일 이후 영국 그루스스터실르 보턴 운더 에지에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 보턴 운더 에지에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley aproximadamente 1380. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 20 de março de 1392, em Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Engl: воттон ундир эдж, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Lisle 3rd Baroness Lisle родилась около 1362 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Warine de Lisle 2nd Baron Lisle было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Pipard, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Berkeley 5th Baron Berkeley около 1380 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла после 20 марта 1392 г. в местности воттон ундир эдж, глоусестиршир, Англия и была похоронена в местности воттон ундир эдж, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
